title: Zagreb, City of Zagreb — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]

content:
Overview

Zagreb is a city in City of Zagreb with a population of 806,341. Croatia’s vibrant capital, a city of Austro-Hungarian elegance, colorful street art, a thriving café culture, and the historic Upper Town with its medieval charm.

Last updated: July 13, 2026
